title: GitHub - ivancernja/crate: See and manage your Android phone's music from your Mac, over WiFi.
excerpt: See and manage your Android phone's music from your Mac, over WiFi. - ivancernja/crate
content_html:
Your Android phone's music, on your Mac. Browse your collection with cover art, play it, and drag new tracks onto the phone over WiFi.

Crate is for people who use an Android phone, or an old one repurposed as a DAP (digital audio player), to carry their own local music (FLAC and friends) instead of streaming, and want a simple, seamless way to manage what's on it. It talks to the phone over wireless ADB, reads the library straight from Android, and keeps everything local.

Crate is free, and I plan to keep it that way. I build and maintain it on my own time, and I'll keep improving it. If it makes managing your music easier, you can support the work by buying me a coffee.

Install

  1. Download the latest Crate.dmg from Releases.
  2. Open it and drag Crate into Applications.
  3. Launch it. A short setup wizard connects your phone (about a minute, the first time only).

Requirements: a Mac with Apple Silicon (M1 or newer) and an Android phone. Intel Macs aren't covered by the prebuilt release yet, but you can build from source for one.

What it does

  • Browse your whole library as albums, artists, or one flat song list, with cover art.
  • Play any track right on your Mac.
  • Drag in files or whole folders to send them to the phone (it keeps the audio and cover art, skips the junk).
  • Delete tracks or albums, with an undo.
  • Save music back to your Mac.
  • Recover messy metadata: artist, album, title, and track numbers get rebuilt from the folder and filenames when a rip has no tags, missing artists are looked up online, and durations are read from the file.
  • Set or fetch album covers, see collection stats, and auto-sync a watched Mac folder.

How connecting works

Crate uses ADB (Google), bundled inside the app.

  • The first time, plug the phone in with a USB cable. The wizard helps you turn on USB debugging (with steps for Pixel, Samsung, Xiaomi, and OnePlus) and then flips the connection to WiFi.
  • After that it reconnects over WiFi on its own whenever both devices are on the same network - at this point you can unplug the cable and forget about it.
  • On macOS 15 and later you grant Crate one Local Network permission (the wizard detects if it's blocked and shows you how to fix it).

It works with any Android phone, since it uses standard Android APIs. Setup menus differ a little across brands, which the wizard handles. Xiaomi/MIUI is the "fussiest" one: it requires a Mi account and an extra "USB debugging (Security settings)" toggle before ADB works.

Privacy

Crate talks to your phone and nothing else, except anonymous album lookups to MusicBrainz, Cover Art Archive, and Wikipedia for artwork and descriptions.

Build from source

npm install
npm run dev      # hot-reloading dev app (connect over USB)
npm run pack     # unsigned .app in dist/ for local testing

Wireless only works from a packaged build, not npm run dev, because macOS ties the Local Network permission to the real app bundle.

Cutting a signed, notarized DMG needs a Developer ID certificate in your keychain and these for notarization:

export APPLE_ID="you@example.com"
export APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD="xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx"
export APPLE_TEAM_ID="XXXXXXXXXX"
npm run dist

The bundled adb is fetched at build time and is not committed to the repo.

License

MIT, see LICENSE.

Not affiliated with Google, Android, or Poweramp.

content_html_zh:
Mac 上的 Android 手机音乐。 浏览带有封面艺术的收藏集、播放它，然后通过 WiFi 将新曲目拖到手机上。

Crate 适合那些使用 Android 手机或旧手机改造成 DAP（数字音频播放器）的用户，他们可以携带自己的本地音乐（FLAC 和其他音乐）而不是流媒体，并且想要一种简单、无缝的方式来管理手机上的内容。 它通过无线 ADB 与手机通信，直接从 Android 读取库，并将所有内容保留在本地。

Crate 是免费的，我打算保持这种状态。 我用自己的时间构建和维护它，并且我会不断改进它。 如果这让你的音乐管理更容易，你可以给我买杯咖啡来支持这项工作。

安装

  1. 从发行版下载最新的 Crate.dmg。
  2. 打开它并将 Crate 拖到应用程序中。
  3. 启动它。 简短的设置向导将连接您的手机（大约一分钟，仅限第一次）。

要求：配备 Apple Silicon（M1 或更高版本）的 Mac 和 Android 手机。 预构建版本尚未涵盖英特尔 Mac 电脑，但您可以从源代码构建一台。

它的作用

  • 以专辑、艺术家或带有封面艺术的单一歌曲列表的形式浏览整个库。
  • 直接在 Mac 上播放任何曲目。
  • 拖入文件或整个文件夹以将它们发送到手机（它保留音频和封面艺术，跳过垃圾）。
  • 删除曲目或专辑，并进行撤消。
  • 将音乐保存回您的 Mac。
  • 恢复混乱的元数据：当 rip 没有标签时，可以从文件夹和文件名重建艺术家、专辑、标题和曲目编号，在线查找缺失的艺术家，并从文件中读取持续时间。
  • 设置或获取专辑封面、查看收藏统计信息以及自动同步观看的 Mac 文件夹。

连接如何运作

Crate 使用 ADB (Google)，捆绑在应用程序内。

  • 首次使用时，请使用 USB 数据线插入手机。 该向导可帮助您打开 USB 调试（包含适用于 Pixel、Samsung、Xiaomi 和 OnePlus 的步骤），然后将连接切换为 WiFi。
  • 之后，只要两个设备位于同一网络上，它就会通过 WiFi 自行重新连接 - 此时您可以拔掉电缆并忘记它。
  • 在 macOS 15 及更高版本上，您向 Crate 授予一项本地网络权限（向导会检测它是否被阻止，并向您展示如何修复它）。

它适用于任何 Android 手机，因为它使用标准 Android API。 向导处理的不同品牌的设置菜单略有不同。 小米/MIUI 是“最挑剔”的：在 ADB 工作之前，它需要一个 Mi 帐户和一个额外的“USB 调试（安全设置）”开关。

隐私

除了匿名查找 MusicBrainz、封面艺术档案和维基百科的艺术作品和描述之外，Crate 不会与您的手机进行对话。

从源代码构建

npm install
npm run dev      # hot-reloading dev app (connect over USB)
npm run pack     # unsigned .app in dist/ for local testing

Wireless 只能在打包版本中运行，不能在 npm run dev 中运行，因为 macOS 将本地网络权限与真实的应用程序包绑定在一起。

切割签名、公证的 DMG 需要钥匙串中的开发者 ID 证书以及用于公证的这些证书：

export APPLE_ID="you@example.com"
export APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD="xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx"
export APPLE_TEAM_ID="XXXXXXXXXX"
npm run dist

捆绑的 adb 在构建时获取，并且不会提交到存储库。

执照

麻省理工学院，请参阅许可证。

不隶属于 Google、Android 或 Poweramp。
